basic_details.job_title: SRCASW Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women (SRCASW)
basic_details.short_information: Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women (SRCASW) Recruitment 2026: Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women has released the official notification for 1 Junior Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Typing Speed, Computer Proficiency
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree from any recognized Institute/University. English Typing @35 wpm OR Hindi Typing @ 30 wpm. Proficiency in Computer Operations.

salary_details.details: Basic pay of INR 19900/- plus dearness allowance as applicable from time to time.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rajgurucollege.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SRCASW Junior Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download SRCASW Junior Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Assistant post at SRCASW?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Junior Assistant post at Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized institution, along with English Typing at 35 wpm or Hindi Typing at 30 wpm, and proficiency in computer operations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Assistant post is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 19900 Per Month, which includes the basic pay and applicable dearness allowance.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates should download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Assistant post at Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women, www.rajgurucollege.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Assistant position is contractual.
